role_summary: Interpret, apply, and uphold the law while advising and advocating for clients in legal matters.
function_statement: Convert legal facts, rules, and strategy into accountable advice, negotiation, and representation.
accountability_statement: Remain professionally accountable for legal judgment, client advocacy, ethical duties, and final representation decisions.

role_summary: Support legal matters by organizing records, drafting under supervision, and keeping procedure on track.
function_statement: Turn case facts, records, deadlines, and draft materials into matter-ready legal support work.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for procedural reliability, record quality, and escalation of issues that require attorney judgment.

role_summary: Build analytical assets that turn ambiguous business or technical questions into defensible decisions.
function_statement: Frame problems, build analytical approaches, and interpret model outputs so stakeholders can act with confidence.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for analytical framing, model validity, and practical interpretation of outputs.

role_summary: Diagnose client problems and redesign processes, governance, or operating models that improve performance.
function_statement: Turn ambiguous business issues into structured recommendations and implementation paths.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for problem framing, recommendation logic, and expected organizational impact.

role_summary: Keep complex cross-functional work aligned so delivery happens under real deadlines and constraints.
function_statement: Convert goals, dependencies, risks, and stakeholder input into coordinated execution.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for delivery alignment, dependency management, and escalation quality.

role_summary: Produce trustworthy financial reporting and judgment around controls, risk, and compliance.
function_statement: Turn financial activity into accurate records, defensible reporting, and controlled decision support.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for financial correctness, control discipline, and compliance quality.
primary_output: Reliable financial statements and control judgments

role_summary: Protect the organization by translating rules into workable control and review decisions.
function_statement: Interpret policies, laws, and controls so operations remain compliant and auditable.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for control adequacy, escalation of material issues, and compliance interpretation.
primary_output: Defensible compliance decisions and control evidence

role_summary: Turn product or system complexity into documentation people can actually use.
function_statement: Translate technical complexity into accurate, maintainable, user-ready documentation.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for documentation accuracy, user fit, and release readiness.

role_summary: Create revenue by understanding customer needs, shaping a solution, and winning agreement.
function_statement: Turn discovery, solution shaping, and negotiation into committed service revenue.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for commercial judgment, relationship trust, and final deal commitments.
primary_output: Closed service revenue and active accounts

role_summary: Resolve customer problems in ways that preserve service continuity and trust.
function_statement: Turn incoming issues and constraints into resolved cases, escalations, and retained customer trust.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for case quality, exception handling, and customer-facing judgment.
primary_output: Resolved customer issues and retained trust

role_summary: Improve content quality by deciding what should be clear, accurate, coherent, and publishable.
function_statement: Turn draft material into publishable content through revision, quality control, and editorial judgment.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for final clarity, consistency, and editorial standards.

role_summary: Report accurate, timely information that people can trust under real-world uncertainty.
function_statement: Turn reporting, verification, and synthesis into credible public information.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for source judgment, factual integrity, and public trust.

role_summary: Keep multiple business functions aligned so services, teams, and resources produce results.
function_statement: Turn goals, constraints, and operating signals into coordinated managerial execution.
accountability_statement: Remain accountable for prioritization, performance outcomes, and resource tradeoffs.
